00:02:01	read.ai meeting notes:	Kai added read.ai meeting notes to the meeting.

Read provides AI generated meeting summaries to make meetings more effective and efficient. View our Privacy Policy at https://www.read.ai/pp

Type "read stop" to disable, or "opt out" to delete meeting data.
00:03:09	Bubbles Notetaker:	Hi 👋 I'm recording this meeting and taking notes for Tamaghna Choudhuri.

After the call, you'll get an AI summary and action items by email.

https://bubbl.es/notetaker
